pages.raw_text:
Sunday turned his guns on the
liquor business yesterday, and the
tabernacle crowded full of men
cheered him on. He ranged his
figures and statements for the most
effective style of attack, and the
saloon business of this city at least
got the worst slamming of its his
tory. Sunday worked stripped to
the shirt and omitted no detail cal
culated to appeal to the audience.

option law based on county iuris-
diction.
